Off Calendar Jan-09-2019 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ren Lowe in Propria Persona.

The Court expressed concern about Parties administering an Estate without the assistance of an Attorney stating that the process is very complicated and technical, that there are rules and statutes that when followed incorrectly can lead to delays and the potential of messing things up at every turn, and that there is potential liability. Mr. Lowe stated that he is being advised by a family friend Paralegal. The Court advised Mr. Lowe that a Paralegal is not an Attorney and is not licensed to practice law in the State of California or give legal advice. Mr. Lowe stated that the reason probate is needed is because the Administrator of the 401K asset is requiring certified letters, and that there is also a Bank of America checking account and a savings account. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (order signed in open Court). Bond is not required. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for January 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for September 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
